parameters.name: date-from
parameters.description: Period start date in yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss format (or short yyyy-MM-dd to API requests)

parameters.name: date-to
parameters.description: Period finish date in yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss format (or short yyyy-MM-dd to API requests)

parameters.name: invoice-nr
parameters.description: Invoice number for PRODUCT_RECEIVE_CONFIRMATION, MOVEMENTS, PRODUCT_OUTGO_CONFIRMATION requests

parameters.name: sales-channel
parameters.description: Sales channel (site or marketplace name) for STOCKSTATE_CHANNEL, ORDERSTATE requests
